ab: Haip qani’an tu na minsanavan, na mulumaqin ca nauba’nanaz.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: Muskun azak it qudasnau’az munca’an icivaa’ mabaliv is tulkuk, palasanuc is mantan macial a paitu sanavan na ispaka’un nauba’nanaz.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: Laqai’ azam is babalivansanglav a, madia’ sala ca macicial a sanglav ha’an balivansanglav.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，菜攤有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: Mabaliv azam is sanglavkabuu’, tankaunu ciin tau’lacdangqac.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

ab: Maca ingalan taimicia babalivas kukutdaqun tupa’ tu, “mantan madavuc ca unglai ciin qalup inaak, mabaliva tukuc!”
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: Mabaliv azam is unglai ciin qalup.
Laqai’ azam babalivas qasu’, tupa ca taimicia tu, “ma’az ca balivun su’u? masqa’ masimal amin ca tulkuk haip, taau saba cuii ca ta’a.”
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today's chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: Tan’aun qudasnau’az tu mantan maqlic sala, ua’ macingav is taimicia tu maqtu’ang naupa vanaqan tukuc.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: Uutu tupa ca taimicia tu naut nii’in dangpia ta’ cuii, nii’in maqtu’ vanaqan.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: Bazbaz ca ingalan a taimicia tu, nuqan mabaliv is kaan inaak i’, mamasqa’ ca kaan naak nii’ amin tu maqlic.
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: Mabalivin azam is tulkuk ciin kaan tu hiku’in, mulumaq mahanat is tatpangka’ a ququul.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: Malabuntu matatala ha, mindumdumin ca diqanin.
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: Katingva’ ca nauba’nanaz mulumaq taqu tu, minkava’ nii’ tu maqtu’pul’uun ca malalasti’, maca ha’anin muqnin inul’uan na mulumaqin.
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn't take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: Tupa kat qudasnau’az tu na palcikaupata’in is sinpitdia ki’ a, amini luklac ca mangka’ na muskun ma’un!
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let's eat together!

ab: Luklac azam is kitlumaq, kaviaz, uskunan ma’us mantan macial sala kau’un a paitu sanavan.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
